$comment: Golden questions for the quality bench (bench/run.mjs). One entry per cookbook shape. Structural expectations only — the bench checks that runs complete, ground themselves in enough sources, and survive citation verification; it does not judge prose. Keep questions stable across releases so scoreboards are comparable. canonicalSource (#148): case-insensitive URL regex for the on-topic canonical source an expert would demand in the kept set — REPORTED as the board's canonical column, never gated.

questions.question: what are the current rate limits for the Claude API at each usage tier
how does HTTP/3 connection migration work and what breaks it in practice
what does recent research say about retrieval-augmented generation reducing hallucinations
SQLite vs PostgreSQL for a single-server web application: when does each win
what notable large language models were released in the last six months
why does nginx return 502 with an upstream sent too big header error and how do you fix it
